_meta.description: Cumulative gathering-job XP required to START each level (same curve for all jobs). Gathering jobs cap at level 200.
_meta.source: Dofus Pour Les Noobs job-XP curve: each level costs 20 more XP than the previous (arithmetic), i.e. cost(L->L+1) = 20*L, giving a closed-form cumulative. Reproduces the observed cumulative level-200 = 398000.
_meta.model: cumulative(N) = coefficient * N * (N-1), with coefficient = 10. Exact for every level 1..200, no interpolation. cumulative(1)=0, cumulative(10)=900, cumulative(100)=99000, cumulative(200)=398000.
_meta.note: This conflicts ~6x with the Wiki Dofus table (which gave 581687 at level 100) — kept this one per the player's direct reading. To switch curves, replace 'formula' with an 'anchors' object {level: cumulative_xp} (linear interpolation between anchors is then used).
